scope: Battle Command enemy command-network cards linked to frontline pressure response and queued issue

verified.notes: TypeScript and Vite production build passed after adding linked-frontline enemy command cards.

Enemy command-network cards derive the linked frontline from group.targetSegment and existing pressureReports, display pressure/defender/reserve/recommendation context, and call applyFrontlinePressureResponse through a new 対応戦線 action. Because applyFrontlinePressureResponse already routes through issueOrQueueBattleCommand, the action queues under 予約指揮 without adding BattleState or save fields.

notVerified.reason: In-app browser localhost URL policy blocks the current http://127.0.0.1:5173/ QA path in this thread.
Mobile/cellphone QA is currently outside the active Takawasi target.

expectedManualFlow: Open Battle Command and advance until enemy command-network cards appear.
Verify each command group with a target frontline shows 対応戦線 with frontline pressure, defenders, reserves, and recommendation.
Click 詳細 and verify the enemy group still selects/scrolls as before.
Click 対応戦線 with queue mode off and verify the same frontline pressure response applies.
Enable 予約指揮, click 対応戦線, and verify a frontline pressure command is queued.
Verify quiet or missing linked frontline cards disable 対応戦線.
Confirm console error count is 0 and enemy command-network card text does not overlap at desktop 1440px.
